title: 阪神大賞典の後に・ただちに浮上セヨ

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No... I was so close!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...So this is how it is.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Nooo! Why are you making that face?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Don't look at me like I'm not even a threat to you!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Grrrrr... But...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm back!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Back already?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wait, what?! How come you're here, Hishiama?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I came to support you, of course...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I see! Perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Please help me train! We can even start today!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What's gotten into you?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I can't stand it! I wanna get better—and I know I
can!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I mean, it sucks! I was all excited again!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But Brian still out-twinkled me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna lose like this again! I don't wanna
call it quits.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Two selfish peas in a pod...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Still, that's just the kind of passion you need to
race.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I've gone too far to turn back now! I guess I
can help you out a little more.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We're going to train until you're begging to stop,
Mayano! I hope you're ready!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Got it! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's what I want to hear! Keep up that
enthusiasm!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Work at nothing less than max strength! If you
don't take your best swing at it for the sake of
your future, you might as well raise a white flag
right now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Roger!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Okay then.... Why don't we have a strategy
meeting? Listen up, Mayano.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Your next chance to race against Brian will be the
spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: The spring Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho—a well-established
long-distance race for top-class racers.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty certain she wants to run against the
best racers.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
She probably saw the Hanshin Daishoten as the
best route to get there.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Got it. Trainer?
choice_data_list: Got it. Let's go to the spring Tenno Sho.
Got it. Let's go to the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Copy that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, we set our sights on the spring Tenno
Sho!
